g.text: HNSW Index Replication — Deserialization (single HNSW index)
(blocks keyed by master shard id, parked until post-load)
Index state remains kProhibit: vector payloads land in the
keyspace, but the HNSW graph does not absorb them yet.
Concurrent index ops would be diverted to pending-updates.
⇡ barrier: every shard finishes hydration before drain ⇡
Fallbacks: missing mappings or remap failure for an index → discard graph, rebuild from key stream.
